projects.title: BuiltByRays CFO Operations
projects.description: Complete CFO operations system with automated financial reporting, client management, and document processing.
projects.challenge: Manual financial processes taking 20+ hours per week, scattered client data, inconsistent reporting.
projects.solution: Built integrated CFO operations platform with automated workflows, centralized client portal, and real-time reporting dashboard.

testimonial.quote: The system transformed how we operate. What used to take days now takes hours.
testimonial.author: Ray Smith
testimonial.title: CEO, BuiltByRays

projects.title: Innovahire HR Platform
projects.description: Comprehensive HR management system with applicant tracking, employee onboarding, and performance management.
projects.challenge: Inefficient hiring process, manual onboarding, no centralized employee data, slow time-to-hire.
projects.solution: Custom HR platform with ATS, automated onboarding workflows, employee portal, and AI-powered candidate screening.

testimonial.quote: We've cut our hiring time in half and candidates love the experience.
testimonial.author: Sarah Johnson
testimonial.title: VP of HR, Innovahire

projects.title: Rosa Lucas Esteban Legal Practice
projects.description: Digital transformation for legal practice with case management, client portal, and document automation.
projects.challenge: Manual document processing, scattered case files, inefficient client communication, paper-heavy processes.
projects.solution: Integrated legal practice management system with automated document generation, secure client portal, and digital case management.

testimonial.quote: The portal has transformed how we work with clients. Everything is organized and accessible.
testimonial.author: Rosa Lucas Esteban
testimonial.title: Attorney
